trigger: Any coherent registered family passes G01-G12
required_outcome: Report EXISTING_COMPLETE_WITNESS_IDENTIFIED and stop before new derivation.

trigger: No coherent registered family passes G01-G12
A pass requires rows from incompatible families or branches
The exchange lift has square minus identity or is identity
The witness is off-shell, kinematic, local, or conditional
required_outcome: Reject G02 and/or G03 as documented.

trigger: The cap cycles or cocycle are assumed rather than branch data
A POSIT/import/comparison supplies affirmative native authority
The frozen family census is incomplete or duplicated
required_outcome: No scientific conclusion; repair the census under an explicit correction layer.

trigger: Independent reconstruction disagrees with the production pass set
required_outcome: No scientific conclusion; adjudicate the disagreement.
